hero.name: Yi Yan
hero.tagline: Passionate about machine learning and intelligent systems, seeking to pursue advanced studies in artificial intelligence.

about.title: About Me
paragraphs: I am an undergraduate student at the School of Systems Science and Engineering, Sun Yat-sen University, majoring in Systems Science and Engineering. I have a strong interest in machine learning, reinforcement learning, and computer vision, and I am actively seeking graduate research opportunities in related fields.

During my undergraduate studies, I have participated in projects related to image recognition and reinforcement learning, including a university innovation training project and the development of a DQN-based 2048 game agent. These experiences have built my practical skills in Python programming, deep learning, and reinforcement learning algorithms.
I aspire to pursue further studies in artificial intelligence, machine learning, or intelligent systems, combining theoretical knowledge with engineering practice to produce impactful results.

items.title: Real-Time Detection of Separation Zones in Inlet Schlieren Images via Deep Learning
items.description: University Innovation Training Program. Real-time detection and recognition of flow separation zones in inlet schlieren images using deep learning. Supervised by Prof. Sun Lei.

items.title: Improved DQN-based 2048 Game Agent
items.description: Trained a 2048 game AI using Deep Q-Network (DQN) reinforcement learning. Built a custom gymnasium-based game environment with a MiniCNN feature extractor, supporting expert data injection for accelerated training, with a pygame visualization interface.

items.title: Deep Reinforcement Learning for Game Agent Applications
items.abstract: Investigated the application of DQN-based deep reinforcement learning algorithms in the 2048 game. Designed a reward function incorporating base score, empty tile rewards, monotonicity rewards, and maximum tile rewards. Used a CNN feature extractor to process game states and employed human expert data injection strategies to accelerate model convergence.

items.name: National Mathematical Modeling Contest
items.description: Project: NIPT Timing Selection and Fetal Abnormality Detection. Built mathematical models for optimizing non-invasive prenatal testing strategies.

items.name: Future Cup · 4th National University Big Data Challenge
items.description: Participated in the 2024 Future Cup 4th National University Big Data Challenge and won the second prize.

items.name: National Encouragement Scholarship
items.description: Awarded the National Encouragement Scholarship for outstanding academic performance.

items.name: National College Student Mathematics Competition
items.description: Won the Guangdong Province Second Prize in the 15th National College Student Mathematics Competition.

items.name: Outstanding Student Scholarship
items.description: Received the Sun Yat-sen University Outstanding Student Scholarship (Third Prize).

items.title: Sun Yat-sen University · Information Engineering · B.S.
items.description: GPA 3.8/5.0. Key coursework: Signals and Systems, Communication Principles, Automatic Control, Data Structures and Algorithms, Microcontrollers and Embedded Systems, Introduction to Reinforcement Learning.
